rulings.Case Title: KIM SMALLWOOD VS. KEVIN SMALLWOOD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft Kevin Small Wood, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 09, 2016, Line 6. PLAINTIFF KIM SMALLWOOD Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft Kevin Small Wood, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATZ GROUP VS. FELIX SOTO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 09, 2016, Line 7. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER BRAGA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Triable issues of fact regarding Braga's status as an occupant, subtenant or guest; as to landlord's knowledge and consent; as to Soto's permanent residency at the premises. =(501/REQ)
